message:
feat(jira): add automation rule management operations (7 new ops, 58 new tests)

Implements jira.automation.rule.{list,get,create,update,enable,disable,delete}
for managing Jira Automation rules via the connector.

- Read ops (list, get) are Low risk / Safe tier
- Write ops (create, update, enable, disable, delete) are High risk / Dangerous
- Added types: JiraAutomationRule, Trigger, Condition, Action
- Added client methods with wiremock integration tests
- Updated manifest with full schemas, network constraints, rate limits
- Total: 23 operations (was 16), 265 tests pass (229 unit + 36 integration)

Closes bead: flywheel_connectors-vc5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
 min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
 protocol_features = []
 max_datagram_bytes = 65000
-interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:90cbfa96b2b970005343071cf821174bdcec1c2627c32c8ad4af8e54971bc43c"
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:0bf7c1dfaea3fb6368e0c36f358da4d5ec94d0e908d762436bd948ba55927404"
 
 [connector]
 id = "fcp.jira"
@@ -1275,6 +1275,466 @@ common_mistakes = [
 examples = ['{"issue_key": "PROJ-123", "worklog_id": "100028"}']
 related = ["jira.worklog.list"]
 
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Operations: Automation Rules

+[provides.operations."jira.automation.rule.list"]
+description = "List automation rules for a Jira project"
+capability = "jira.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.automation.rule.list".rate_limit]
+max = 60
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."jira.automation.rule.list".input_schema]
+required = ["project_id"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.automation.rule.list".input_schema.properties.project_id]
+description = "Jira project ID (numeric)"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.automation.rule.list".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.automation.rule.list".output_schema.properties.rules]
+description = "Array of automation rules"
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.automation.rule.list".output_schema.properties.total]
+description = "Total number of rules"
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.automation.rule.list".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["*.atlassian.net"]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 5
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 2097152
+
+[provides.operations."jira.automation.rule.list".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "List all automation rules configured for a Jira project."
+common_mistakes = ["Using project key instead of numeric project ID."]
+examples = ['{"project_id": "10001"}']
+related = ["jira.automation.rule.get", "jira.automation.rule.create"]
+
+[provides.operations."jira.automation.rule.get"]

+require_sni = true

+examples = ['{"project_id": "10001", "name": "Auto-assign on create", "trigger": {"type": "jira.issue.created"}, "actions": [{"type": "jira.issue.assign", "value": {"accountId": "abc123"}}]}']

+common_mistakes = ["Deleting rules without disabling them first."]

+
